plugins.name: reme-service
plugins.description: Service-tier markdown vault — three high-level MCP tools (retrieve / remember / maintain). reme2 internals own the R-M-W loop; the agent just hands off material.

plugins.name: reme-expert
plugins.description: Expert-tier markdown vault — Claude Code's agent runs the R-M-W loop directly using raw memory_* primitives, guided by the reme protocol skill + reme-distiller / reme-curator subagents.
